title: F2P Starter Core
description:
This partial team composition is great for people who want to mix and match other units into their roster and acts as a flexible starting point. Core frontline unit Apollinis provides your backline units more time to do damage.

Beta tested by EOD.

title: Expanded Core
description:
This team clears content well and consists of two Protectors. All 5★ units here are just at base copies (R0/E0).

Beta tested by EOD.

title: Seroplumanth R2 Core
description:
This team clears content well and consists of two Protectors. Key 5★ units with high Rapport/Eidothreads are Cinechel R1, Camcorgi R2, Seroplumanth R2, Bai Mei E3 and Herocrates E1.

Beta tested by EOD.
